validationSpan.classList.contains('text-danger')) {\n                        validationSpan.textContent = message;\n                    }\n                }\n            }\n            \n --- UserPromptSubmit ---
Don't use viewbag in partial view, better make a small model, datetimepicker model, also there is too much manual validation
Remove the script from the partial and let it only take care of the input and label, flatpickr initialization should be once in site.js, also do not remove .text-danger manually
remove manual validation for fields that are already covered by validation in models(Required,StringLength), keep asp-validation-for and _ValidationScriptsPartial so client-side + server-side validation work automatically and only keep custom validation logic for the rules like EndDate > StartDate

--- UserPromptSubmit ---
Apply the Trips pattern with these decisions:
DateTime picker fields:
Activity: Date
Accommodation: CheckInDate, CheckOutDate
Transport: DepartureTime, ArrivalTime
Destination: no date fields
Review: no date fields
Autocomplete relationships:
Destination Create/Edit: Trip autocomplete
Activity Create/Edit: Destination autocomplete
Accommodation Create/Edit: Destination autocomplete
Transport Create/Edit: Destination autocomplete
Review Create/Edit: User autocomplete and Destination autocomplete
Soft delete:
Add and use IsDeleted for all main editable entities: Destination, Activity, Accommodation, Transport, Review.
Filter IsDeleted records out of Index, Details, Edit, Delete and Search actions.
AJAX search fields:
Destinations: City, Country, Trip name
Activities: Name, TypeOfActivity, Destination city/country
Accommodations: Name, Type, Address, Destination city/country
Transports: Type, Destination city/country
Reviews: Comment, Rating, User name/email, Destination city/country
FormModel naming:
DestinationFormModel
ActivityFormModel
AccommodationFormModel
TransportFormModel
ReviewFormModel
Keep the same UI style, partial view structure, AJAX search pattern, autocomplete pattern, validation style, AntiForgeryToken usage, and site.js reuse from Trips.

(!value) {\n+                    setValidationMessage(input, '');\n+                    return;\n+                }\n+\n+                if (value < tripStart || value > tripEnd) {\n+
